items.title_en: Most arguments are about ego, not ideas
items.title_zh: 大多数争论源于自尊心而非观点
items.summary_en: Most arguments are about ego, not ideas, argues a thoughtful essay on online discourse. The piece offers tips like listening, focusing on substance, and curbing status signaling to have more productive discussions. It resonates with engineers, managers, and anyone who debates complex topics.
items.summary_zh: 一篇深思熟虑的文章认为大多数争论源自自尊心而非观点本身，建议在在线讨论中多倾听、聚焦实质、克制攀比。文中还给出提升讨论成效的做法，适用于工程师、管理者以及任何在复杂话题上辩论的人。

items.title_en: For first time, a cell built from scratch grows and divides
items.title_zh: 首次从零构建的细胞能够生长并分裂
items.summary_en: Researchers have built a cell from scratch that can grow and divide, marking a milestone in bottom-up synthetic biology. By assembling functional cellular life from individual components, the work advances the dream of programmable biology and could unlock new biotechnologies and origins-of-life insights. Yet, challenges around stability, safety, and control remain as researchers push toward more complex designs.
items.summary_zh: 研究者首次从零构建出可生长和分裂的细胞，标志着自下而上的合成生物学里程碑。通过从单个组件组装功能性细胞生命，这项工作推动了可编程生物学的实现，并可能为生物技术和起源研究带来新机遇。当然，稳定性、安全性与可控性仍是未来进一步复杂化设计时需要面对的挑战。

items.title_en: Sony Deletes 551 Movies PlayStation Owners Paid For
items.title_zh: 索尼删除了 PlayStation 用户购买的 551 部电影
items.summary_en: Sony reportedly removed 551 StudioCanal titles from PlayStation libraries, affecting owners who thought they had purchased those films. The incident underlines how digital ownership hinges on licensing and can disappear with rights changes. It raises questions about the permanence of digital libraries and consumer protections.
items.summary_zh: 据报导，索尼从 PlayStation 库中移除了 551 部 StudioCanal 的电影，影响了以为自己购买过的用户。事件凸显数字所有权依赖于许可，权利变更就可能导致内容消失。引发对数字馆藏永久性与消费者保护的思考。

items.title_en: Nintendo has raised its employees base salary by 10%
items.title_zh: 任天堂将员工基本薪资提高10%
items.summary_en: Nintendo announced a 10% raise to base salaries, signaling wage growth in a major entertainment tech company. The move may aid retention and morale amid tight labor markets while squeezing margins modestly. It also mirrors broader wage-tightening and inflation-adaptation trends in the industry.
items.summary_zh: 任天堂宣布将员工基本工资提高10%，显示出在劳动力紧张的市场中公司对人才的重视。此举有助于提升留任与士气，但可能对利润率产生一定挤压，反映出行业的薪资调整与通胀应对趋势。

items.title_en: Asahi Linux 7.1 Progress Report
items.title_zh: Asahi Linux 7.1 进展报告
items.summary_en: Asahi Linux 7.1 delivers new kernel improvements, broader Apple Silicon support, and performance tweaks aimed at making Macs run Linux more smoothly. The update narrows hardware gaps and enhances stability for everyday use and development on Apple hardware. It signals ongoing momentum for Linux on consumer devices.
items.summary_zh: Asahi Linux 7.1 的进展包括内核改进、对 Apple Silicon 的更广泛支持以及性能优化，旨在让在 Mac 上运行 Linux 更加顺畅。此次更新缩小了硬件兼容性差距、提升了日常使用与开发的稳定性，继续推动 Linux 在消费级设备上的应用。

items.title_en: Claude Code is steganographically marking requests
items.title_zh: Claude Code 以隐写方式标记请求
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate how Claude Code can embed hidden signals in prompts, enabling steganographic tagging of requests. This raises questions about model privacy, misuse, and provenance in AI-assisted workflows. The finding highlights the need for robust controls around prompt encoding.
items.summary_zh: 研究者展示了 Claude Code 如何在提示中嵌入隐写信号，给请求标记隐藏标识。这引发对模型隐私、滥用和工作流可追溯性的担忧，凸显了对提示编码的鲁棒控制的必要性。

items.title_en: Physical disc production ending in Jan 2028 for new games on PlayStation
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年 1 月停止新作实体光盘生产
items.summary_en: Sony will end physical disc production for new PlayStation releases in January 2028, accelerating its digital-first strategy. The move reduces manufacturing and distribution costs but may affect collectors, retailers, and regions with stronger physical markets. It signals a lasting shift in how console games are distributed and consumed.
items.summary_zh: 索尼将于 2028 年 1 月停止新作实体光盘的生产，进一步推动数字化优先策略。此举降低了制造与发行成本，但可能影响收藏者、零售商以及实体市场较强的地区，预示着主机游戏发行与消费方式的长期转变。

items.title_en: Announcing the release of Box3D, an open source 3D physics engine
items.title_zh: 宣布发布 Box3D：开源的 3D 物理引擎
items.summary_en: Box3D arrives as an open-source successor in 3D physics engines, following Box2D lineage. It aims to deliver robust rigid-body dynamics with a modular design and easier integration for games and simulations, inviting community contributions. If you build 3D physics into your project, Box3D could become a go-to option without licensing friction.
items.summary_zh: Box3D 作为 3D 物理引擎的开源继任者加入，沿袭 Box2D 的传统，目标是提供健壮的刚体动力学、模块化设计以及更易的集成，鼓励社区贡献。若你的项目需要 3D 物理，这个引擎可能成为无许可负担的首选选项。

items.title_en: A retrospective of my time on the internet
items.title_zh: 我在互联网上的时光回顾
items.summary_en: A personal retrospective reflects on online culture, information overload, and the evolving web. The piece offers candid thoughts on privacy, communities, and how to curate a healthier online presence. It reminds readers that your online footprint shapes work and life.
items.summary_zh: 一篇个人回忆文章反思了网络文化、信息过载以及互联网的演变。文章坦诚地讨论隐私、社区以及如何打造更健康的线上形象，提醒读者线上的足迹会影响工作与生活。

items.title_en: Monetization Gateway
items.title_zh: 货币化网关上线
items.summary_en: Cloudflare launches Monetization Gateway, a centralized service to monetize online content through payments, gating, and access control. It streamlines revenue workflows for publishers, reducing integration friction and enabling more consistent monetization across sites. The product highlights the industry’s move toward turnkey monetization tools for the open web.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出 Monetization Gateway，提供一个集中化服务，通过支付、门控和访问控制来实现内容变现。它简化了出版商的收入工作流，降低集成难度，并实现跨站点更一致的变现。该产品凸显了在线内容领域向“端到端”变现工具的趋势。

items.title_en: Department of Commerce has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.title_zh: 商务部取消对 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的出口管制
items.summary_en: The Department of Commerce has eased export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, enabling broader international distribution. The move could accelerate global AI deployment and competition, while inviting regulatory and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 商务部放松了对 Claude Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 的出口管制，使其在全球范围内的分发更为广泛。这一举措可能加速全球 AI 的部署与竞争，同时带来监管与安全方面的考量。

items.title_en: Meta loses bid to dismiss US states' claims that FB, Instagram addict children
items.title_zh: Meta 未能驳回美州对其指控：Facebook 与 Instagram 使儿童上瘾
items.summary_en: A court denies Meta’s bid to dismiss multi-state claims that Facebook and Instagram contribute to child addiction. The suit remains active, signaling ongoing regulatory scrutiny of how social platforms influence youth. The outcome could influence future policy and potential remedies.
items.summary_zh: 法院拒绝了 Meta 驳回多州控诉的请求，控诉称 Facebook 与 Instagram 会使儿童成瘾。诉讼继续进行，表明对社交平台如何影响青少年的监管关注仍在加强，未来的政策和救济措施或将因此受到影响。

items.title_en: Claude Sonnet 5
items.title_zh: Claude Sonnet 5
items.summary_en: Anthropic released Claude Sonnet 5, the newest member of its Claude family. The update emphasizes stronger reasoning capabilities and tighter safety controls for enterprise AI deployments.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Sonnet 5，这是 Claude 家族的最新成员，强调改进的推理能力与企业部署的安全控制。它面向企业场景，优化推理质量并提升对安全约束的可控性。

items.title_en: Internal Combustion Engine
items.title_zh: 内燃机
items.summary_en: An explainer outlines how an internal combustion engine converts chemical energy into motion, tracing the thermodynamic cycle, efficiency limits, and the role of turbocharging and variable valve timing. It shows why ICE remains central to transportation despite electrification and what improvements are needed to reduce emissions. The piece provides a clear picture of ongoing design tradeoffs in modern engines.
items.summary_zh: 文章剖析内燃机如何把化学能转化为运动能，追踪热力学循环、效率极限，以及涡轮增压和可变气门正时的作用。它揭示在电气化浪潮下，内燃机为何仍然是交通工具的核心，并指出为降低排放需要的改进。内容清晰地呈现了现代发动机在设计上的权衡。

items.title_en: Pine64 launch $50 smart speaker for Home Assistant tinkerers
items.title_zh: Pine64 推出 50 美元的 Home Assistant 智能音箱
items.summary_en: Pine64 launches a $50 smart speaker aimed at Home Assistant tinkerers, likely built on open hardware and supporting local control. It promises affordable, privacy-conscious automation, and a platform for experimentation with DIY smart homes. The price point lowers the barrier to building edge-driven voice interfaces.
items.summary_zh: Pine64 推出面向 Home Assistant 爱好者的 50 美元智能音箱，预计采用开源硬件并支持本地控制。它承诺提供经济实惠、注重隐私的家庭自动化平台，便于进行边缘计算型语音界面的 DIY 实验。

items.title_en: This Cell Feeds, Grows and Reproduces. and It's Manmade
items.title_zh: 这个细胞是人造的，能喂养、成长、繁殖
items.summary_en: A New York Times interactive piece profiles a manmade cell that can be fed, grown, and even reproduce in the lab. It highlights advances in synthetic biology and the ethical questions surrounding programmable life, while illustrating how far laboratory techniques have come in building living systems.
items.summary_zh: 这篇纽约时报的互动报道聚焦于一种在实验室中可被喂养、成长甚至繁殖的人造细胞，凸显合成生物学的进展及围绕可编程生命的伦理问题，同时展示了实验室在构建生命系统方面的突破。

items.title_en: Godot will no longer accept AI-authored code contributions
items.title_zh: Godot 将不再接受 AI 编写的代码贡献
items.summary_en: The Godot Foundation bans AI-authored code contributions to the core, citing concerns about reliability and maintainability. The policy underscores the ongoing tension in OSS between AI-assisted tooling and the need for human oversight in critical code.
items.summary_zh: Godot 基金会宣布不再接受 AI 编写的代码提交，理由是对可靠性和可维护性的担忧。此举凸显开源社区在 AI 辅助编码和人类审阅之间的持续张力。

items.title_en: ArXiv's Next Chapter
items.title_zh: ArXiv 的下一章
items.summary_en: ArXiv outlines its plan for the next chapter, focusing on governance, tooling improvements, and sustainable operations. The post emphasizes scaling moderation, API enhancements, and community governance to support open-access research.
items.summary_zh: ArXiv 公布未来发展路线，聚焦治理、工具改进与长期可持续运营。文章强调扩大内容审查与元数据/API 的改进，以及社区治理，以支持开放获取的研究。

items.title_en: Claude Science
items.title_zh: Claude Science
items.summary_en: Claude Science is a new product focused on scientific workloads, offering specialized reasoning and data-handling features for researchers. It aims to speed up literature review, modeling, and experimentation workflows for scientists.
items.summary_zh: Claude Science 是面向科学工作负载的新产品，提供专门的推理和数据处理能力，帮助研究人员加速分析与建模。面向研究人员和数据科学家，旨在优化文献综述、实验设计与数据分析的工作流。

items.title_en: Google copybara: moving code between repositories
items.title_zh: Google Copybara：跨代码库迁移代码的工具
items.summary_en: Copybara automates code migration across repositories with customizable transformations and history preservation. It helps teams maintain consistent workflows when moving assets, enabling cleaner separation of projects and easier collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Copybara 能在不同代码库之间自动迁移代码，支持自定义转换并保留提交历史。它帮助团队在跨仓库迁移时保持工作流的一致性，使项目分离更清晰、协作更高效。

items.title_en: The first early human eggs from stem cells
items.title_zh: 首批由干细胞培育的早期人类卵子
items.summary_en: Lab researchers have produced early-stage human eggs from stem cells, marking a milestone in reproductive biology. The capability could accelerate study of human gametogenesis and infertility therapies, but ethical and safety questions will shape how quickly such work translates to clinics.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员在实验室用干细胞培育出早期人类卵子，标志着生殖生物学的一个里程碑。这一能力可能加速对人类生殖发生和不孕治疗的研究，但伦理与安全问题将影响其向临床的转化速度。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Parsewise (YC P25) – Reason Across Documents with an API
items.title_zh: Parsewise（YC P25）上线：通过 API 实现跨文档推理
items.summary_en: Parsewise offers an API to reason across documents, enabling applications to query and derive insights from a corpus rather than a single file. This enables smarter document intelligence for teams dealing with large document collections, from research to knowledge bases. Developers can integrate multi-document Q&A, search, and summarization workflows.
items.summary_zh: Parsewise（YC P25）提供通过 API 对跨文档进行推理的能力，使应用能够从一个文档集合中提取见解，而非局限于单篇文档。这为需要处理大量文档的团队带来更智能的文档分析能力，适用于研究和知识库等场景。开发者可以将多文档问答、搜索与摘要等工作流接入到应用。

items.title_en: Ray Tracer in SQL
items.title_zh: SQL 实现的光线追踪
items.summary_en: ClickHouse's Ray Tracer in SQL demonstrates how expressive SQL can be when used for graphics-like workloads, implementing ray tracing entirely in SQL primitives. The project serves as a provocative proof of concept and a pointer to what’s possible with vectorized engines. It invites exploration of SQL-based rendering techniques and performance considerations.
items.summary_zh: ClickHouse 将光线追踪完全用 SQL 原语实现，展示了 SQL 在图形化工作负载中的表达力。该项目是一种挑衅性的概念证明，指向向量化引擎潜在的可能性，同时促使人们探讨基于 SQL 的渲染技术及其性能边界。

items.title_en: I ported Kubernetes to the browser
items.title_zh: 我把 Kubernetes 移植到了浏览器
items.summary_en: Porting Kubernetes to the browser demonstrates running components in WebAssembly or similar in-browser runtimes, enabling offline demos or teaching orchestration concepts. It surfaces challenges around networking, storage, and security when moving cluster infrastructure into the client.
items.summary_zh: 把 Kubernetes 移植到浏览器演示了在浏览器运行组件的可能性，便于离线演示和教学编排概念。也暴露了将集群基础设施移至客户端时在网络、存储和安全方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Nano Banana 2 Lite
items.title_zh: Nano Banana 2 Lite
items.summary_en: Nano Banana 2 Lite is a lightweight image model in the Gemini image lineup designed for fast, on-device inference with a smaller compute footprint. It enables faster prototyping and on-device AI work without cloud latency.
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 Lite 是 Gemini 图像模型家族的轻量版本，设计用于快速推理并降低计算开销。它是一款面向快速推理的轻量级图像模型，适合在本地设备上使用，减小算力需求。

items.title_en: Leanstral 1.5
items.title_zh: Leanstral 1.5
items.summary_en: Leanstral 1.5 updates bring performance improvements and expanded capabilities for more practical, instruction-following use in lightweight language-model deployments.
items.summary_zh: Leanstral 1.5 更新带来性能提升与扩展功能，使其在轻量级语言模型部署中更易于执行指令式任务。

items.title_en: The C to Rust migration book
items.title_zh: C 到 Rust 迁移手册
items.summary_en: The migration book provides practical guidance for porting C codebases to Rust, covering ownership, error handling, FFI, and incremental porting strategies. It offers tooling recommendations, migration patterns, and common pitfalls to avoid. It aims to help teams modernize critical software with lower risk.
items.summary_zh: 本书提供将 C 代码迁移到 Rust 的实用指南，覆盖所有权、错误处理、FFI 以及逐步迁移策略。它给出工具推荐、迁移模式以及常见坑点，帮助团队在降低风险的前提下实现关键软件的现代化。

items.title_en: Reduce GVisor Cold Starts with GPU Snapshotting
items.title_zh: 用 GPU 快照减少 GVisor 冷启动时间
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate reducing GPU cold-start latency for gVisor-based workloads by snapshotting GPU memory and restoring CUDA state. The technique cuts startup times and improves throughput for GPU-accelerated sandboxes in the cloud. It suggests a practical path to faster, more responsive containerized GPU workloads.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示通过对 GPU 内存进行快照并恢复 CUDA 状态，显著降低基于 gVisor 的工作负载在冷启动时的延迟。这一技术缩短了启动时间并提升了云中 GPU 加速沙箱的吞吐量，提供了实现更快、响应更好的容器化 GPU 工作负载的切实路径。

items.title_en: How We Made IPFS Content Publishing 10x Faster
items.title_zh: 我们让 IPFS 内容发布快了 10 倍
items.summary_en: Probelab explains how IPFS publishing was sped up by roughly 10x using Optimistic Provide and related optimizations. The approach reduces latency by proactively distributing blocks and improving availability across peers. It showcases practical strategies to scale decentralized content delivery.
items.summary_zh: Probelab 介绍如何通过 Optimistic Provide 等优化将 IPFS 内容发布速度提升约 10 倍，提前分发数据块并提高对等节点的可用性以降低延迟。这展示了在去中心化内容分发中实现可扩展性的实用策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: GolemUI – The new paradigm for JavaScript forms
items.title_zh: Show HN：GolemUI——JavaScript 表单的新范式
items.summary_en: GolemUI proposes a new paradigm for building JavaScript forms, likely focusing on declarative schemas, accessibility, and ease of validation. If adopted, it could simplify complex form UX and speed up frontend development. The post invites readers to try an innovative approach to web forms.
items.summary_zh: GolemUI 提出一种构建 JavaScript 表单的新范式，可能聚焦于声明式模式、可访问性与便捷的校验。若被广泛采用，可能简化复杂表单的用户体验并加速前端开发。文章鼓励读者尝试这类前瞻性表单实现。

items.title_en: Knoppix
items.title_zh: Knoppix
items.summary_en: Knoppix, the pioneer live Linux distribution, is surveyed—its approach to hardware autodetection and running from removable media influenced modern portability and recovery workflows. The piece traces why Knoppix mattered for the era of live CDs and USB booting. It offers context for current portable Linux tools.
items.summary_zh: Knoppix 作为开创性实时/现场运行的 Linux 发行版的概览，展示其硬件自检测与从可移动介质启动的理念如何影响现代便携与救援场景。

items.title_en: Matrix Orthogonalization Improves Memory in Recurrent Models
items.title_zh: 矩阵正交化提升循环模型的内存利用率
items.summary_en: Orthogonalizing recurrent weight matrices reduces memory usage and stabilizes training, enabling larger or longer-sequence models with less memory pressure. This technique helps maintain gradient flow and can improve training efficiency for RNNs.
items.summary_zh: 对循环网络的权重矩阵进行正交化可在训练时降低内存占用并稳定梯度，从而让模型规模和序列长度更大。该方法有望提升递归模型的可扩展性和训练效率。

items.title_en: From brain waves to words: a new path to communication without surgery
items.title_zh: 脑波到文字：无需手术的全新沟通路径
items.summary_en: Researchers are turning brain activity into text without surgery by decoding brain signals with AI. The approach promises new communication options for people with paralysis or severe speech impairment, but faces accuracy, speed, and privacy challenges.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员通过人工智能解码脑信号，在不进行手术的情况下将脑波转写为文字。这一路径为瘫痪或语言受限者带来新的沟通方式，但在准确性、速度与隐私方面仍存在挑战。

items.title_en: Spanish government 'quietly bans use of Palantir' in critical state systems
items.title_zh: 西班牙政府悄悄禁止在关键国家系统中使用 Palantir
items.summary_en: Spain reportedly banned Palantir from critical state systems, signaling concerns over data governance and vendor risk in sensitive government contexts. The move reflects broader scrutiny of private surveillance tech in public sector workflows and the tradeoffs between capability and safeguard. It may influence procurement choices across Europe.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，西班牙政府在关键国家系统中禁止使用 Palantir，显示出对数据治理与供应商风险的担忧。此举反映了公共部门对私有监控技术的持续审查，以及能力与安全之间的权衡，可能影响欧洲地区的采购决策。

items.title_en: I built a mmWave material classification radar (2025)
items.title_zh: I built a mmWave material classification radar
items.summary_en: A hands-on look at using millimeter-wave radar to distinguish materials by their dielectric signatures. The approach has practical implications for robotics, security, and industrial sensing.
items.summary_zh: 作者展示了用毫米波雷达对材料进行分类的实现，材料在雷达信号中的介电特性差异帮助识别。此方法对机器人、安防和工业传感等领域有实际应用潜力。

items.title_en: Tokyo has only two barley tea makers, we visited one to see how mugicha is made
items.title_zh: 东京仅有两家麦茶厂，我们参访其中一家了解麦茶的制作
items.summary_en: A micro-insight into Tokyo's mugicha production, exploring small-scale makers, traditional brewing techniques, and how consumer demand shapes the process.
items.summary_zh: 对东京麦茶制作的微观观察，探讨小型制造商、传统酿制工艺以及消费者需求对工艺的影响。

items.title_en: Forestiere Underground Gardens
items.title_zh: Forestiere 地下花园
items.summary_en: A sprawling network of cave-like rooms and gardens carved by hand, Forestiere Underground Gardens is a striking example of early 20th-century subterranean architecture. Visitors experience a self-contained oasis with a climate-controlled interior carved from local rock.
items.summary_zh: Forestiere 地下花园是一组由人工开凿的洞室和庭园的庞大网络，是20世纪早期地下建筑的引人注目案例。游客在内部体验由本地岩石打造、实现自给自足的气候调控的“世外桃源”。

items.title_en: Have you restarted your computer this week?
items.title_zh: Have You Restarted Your Computer This Week?
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on the role of restarts in modern systems, arguing that periodic reboots remain valuable for stability, helping clear memory and reset stuck processes.
items.summary_zh: 本文主张即使现代系统改用热更新，定期重启仍有助于清理内存、解决卡死进程并提升稳定性。

items.title_en: Single header Parser Combinators for C
items.title_zh: C 语言的单头文件解析器组合器
items.summary_en: A header-only library for C that provides parser combinators, enabling concise, modular parsing without external dependencies. It reduces boilerplate and dependency footprint for C projects needing simple grammars.
items.summary_zh: 一个用于 C 语言的单头文件解析器组合器库，提供模块化的解析能力，无需外部依赖。CParseC 让解析器实现更简洁，适合对体积和依赖要求较低的项目。

items.title_en: Memoirs of Extraordinary Popular Delusions and the Madness of Crowds (1852)
items.title_zh: 《群体的非凡错觉与众人的疯狂》（1852）
items.summary_en: An 1852 classic on crowd psychology that catalogs famous delusions and speculative manias. Though old, it helps readers recognize how hype and groupthink shape technology and finance today. The work remains a useful lens for analyzing bubbles and social dynamics in tech.
items.summary_zh: 1852 年的经典著作，系统梳理群体心理与历史上的共识错判与群体狂热。即使年代久远，它也为理解科技与金融领域的牛熊逻辑提供洞见，帮助读者识别泡沫与群体行为对创新的影响。

items.title_en: Meta is adding rate limits and soft paywall to smart glasses
items.title_zh: Meta 将对智能眼镜添加速率限制和软性付费墙
items.summary_en: Meta is imposing rate limits and a soft paywall on features accessed via its AI-enabled smart glasses. The move affects developers and users relying on AI capabilities in wearable devices, signaling tighter access control and monetization.
items.summary_zh: Meta 将对其智能眼镜中的 AI 功能实施速率限制并引入软性付费墙。此举将影响开发者与用户对可访问性与成本的权衡，可能推动更高效的使用和新的商业模式。

items.title_en: How employment changes when firms adopt generative AI
items.title_zh: 当企业采用生成式 AI 时就业如何改变
items.summary_en: Generative AI adoption shifts job roles, increasing demand for prompt engineering, data handling, and system integration, while potentially reducing demand for routine tasks. The change underscores new skill requirements and organizational adaptation.
items.summary_zh: 当企业引入生成式 AI 时，岗位结构发生变化，对提示工程、数据处理和系统集成等能力的需求上升，部分例行性工作可能被替代。

items.title_en: TabFM: A zero-shot foundation model for tabular data
items.title_zh: TabFM：面向表格数据的零-shot 基础模型
items.summary_en: TabFM is a zero-shot foundation model designed for tabular data, enabling predictions without task-specific fine-tuning. It promises simpler deployment for analytics pipelines, while evaluating how it stacks up against task-specialized approaches.
items.summary_zh: TabFM 是一个面向表格数据的零-shot 基础模型，在不进行特定任务微调的情况下也能进行预测。它有望 simplif y analytics 流程的部署，同时需要评估其与专门任务模型的性能比较。

items.title_en: Hatari – Online Atari ST/STE/TT/Falcon Emulator
items.title_zh: Hatari 在线 Atari ST/STE/TT/Falcon 模拟器
items.summary_en: Hatari now runs in the browser, letting users emulate Atari ST family machines online without local setup. The browser-based emulator leverages WebAssembly to bring classic systems to modern devices.
items.summary_zh: Hatari 现已支持在浏览器中运行，用户无需本地安装即可模拟 Atari ST 家族的机器。基于浏览器的模拟借助 WebAssembly 将经典系统带到现代设备上。

items.title_en: CERN bids farewell to the LHC and enters Long Shutdown 3
items.title_zh: CERN 向大型强子对撞机道别，进入长期停机3阶段
items.summary_en: CERN begins Long Shutdown 3, a multi-year maintenance and upgrades window for the LHC; essential for addressing hardware aging and enabling next-gen experiments.
items.summary_zh: CERN 开始长期停机3阶段，进行 LHC 的维护和升级，旨在解决硬件老化并为下一轮实验做准备。

items.title_en: Zluda 6 release (run unmodified CUDA applications on non-Nvidia GPUs)
items.title_zh: Zluda 6 发布：在非 Nvidia GPU 上运行未修改的 CUDA 应用
items.summary_en: Zluda 6 releases material to run unmodified CUDA apps on non-NVIDIA GPUs, bridging CUDA software to AMD/Intel GPUs. The update expands hardware freedom for AI and HPC workloads and challenges vendor lock-in. It signals progress toward more diverse GPU ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Zluda 6 发布实现将未修改的 CUDA 应用在非 NVIDIA GPU 上运行，打破了对 CUDA 专属硬件的依赖边界。对 AI 与 HPC 工作负载的硬件选择带来更多自由，也是在推动多厂商生态的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: My 13-year-old built an ant colony tracker
items.title_zh: Show HN: My 13-year-old built an ant colony tracker
items.summary_en: A Show HN entry about a 13-year-old building an ant colony tracker, highlighting hands-on biology hardware tinkering and data visualization.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：我的13岁孩子自制了蚁群跟踪器，展示青少年在传感硬件和数据可视化方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Building a custom octocopter from scratch with no prior hardware experience
items.title_zh: 零基础自制八旋翼无人机
items.summary_en: A novice documents building an octocopter from scratch, covering parts selection, assembly, and flight testing. The project underscores learning curve, safety considerations, and the importance of modular hardware and flight controllers for beginners. A hands-on blueprint for amateur drones.
items.summary_zh: 新手完整记录从零开始组装八轴无人机的过程，涵盖部件选择、组装与测试。突出学习曲线、安全性以及飞控集成的重要性，为爱好者提供动手蓝图。

items.title_en: How does a pull-back car work? Illustrated teardown
items.title_zh: 拉回式玩具车如何工作？图解拆解
items.summary_en: Pull-back cars use a spring-loaded motor and simple gears; the teardown reveals how stored energy translates into rolling propulsion. The illustrated breakdown highlights the elegance and limits of toy engineering, plus how small parts coordinate to make the car move.
items.summary_zh: 拉回式玩具车通过弹簧驱动的马达和简单齿轮实现推进。图解拆解揭示了玩具工程的简洁性与局限，以及小零件如何协同作用让玩具起作用。

items.title_en: The end of my AArch64 desktop experiment
items.title_zh: AArch64 桌面实验的终结
items.summary_en: An engineer explains why the long-running AArch64 desktop experiment is winding down, citing software ecosystem maturity, driver gaps, and performance constraints. The piece signals a shift away from ARM-based desktop hopes toward server or embedded roles. It frames the decision as a pragmatic reallocation of resources.
items.summary_zh: 作者表明 AArch64 桌面实验逐渐走向尽头，原因包括生态系统不成熟、驱动与兼容性不足以及性能瓶颈。这意味着将 ARM 桌面的尝试转向服务器或嵌入式场景的现实需求。文章将其视为资源重新分配的务实选择。

items.title_en: Newly discovered spider builds spring loaded snare to catch ants
items.title_zh: 新发现的蜘蛛用弹簧陷阱捕蚁
items.summary_en: A newly documented spider uses a spring-loaded snare to catch ants, showcasing a novel predation strategy in arachnids. The rapid, mechanical trap highlights evolved specialization and could inspire bio-inspired trap design in engineering.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员发现一种新蜘蛛，利用弹簧式陷阱捕捉蚂蚁，这是一种罕见的捕食策略。其快速的机械捕捉机制体现了进化的专业化，并可能为生物启发的捕捉装置提供灵感。

items.title_en: Google's New reCAPTCHA Wants Your Camera Access and 21 Points of Your Hand
items.title_zh: 谷歌新版 reCAPTCHA 要求访问你的摄像头及手部21个关键点
items.summary_en: Google's new reCAPTCHA variant requests camera access and analyzes 21 hand-tracking points to distinguish humans from bots. The approach raises privacy and biometric-data concerns, prompting questions about consent, data retention, and the tradeoffs between security and user experience. It adds to the ongoing debate about increasingly invasive integrity checks.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌新版 reCAPTCHA 要求获取摄像头权限并分析21个手部追踪点来区分人类与机器人。这一方法引发隐私和生物数据处理的担忧，涉及同意、数据保留以及安全与用户体验之间的权衡，进一步加剧了对日益侵入性身份验证的讨论。

items.title_en: Red Programming Language: Static linking support
items.title_zh: Red 编程语言：静态链接支持
items.summary_en: Red language gains official static linking support, enabling standalone executables with fewer runtime dependencies. The change simplifies distribution and embedding Red in other projects, at the cost of larger binary sizes and potential platform quirks. It broadens Red’s appeal for systems programming and portability.
items.summary_zh: Red 语言新增静态链接支持，使可执行文件在依赖运行时库更少的情况下独立运行。此变更简化了分发与在其他项目中嵌入 Red 的难度，但可能增加二进制体积并带来平台相关问题。此举提升了 Red 在系统编程与跨平台场景中的适用性。

items.title_en: Register Korea's First PC 'SE-8001' as a National Important Material
items.title_zh: 韩国首台个人计算机 SE-8001 被列为国家重要材料
items.summary_en: South Korea designated its first personal computer, the SE-8001, as a National Important Material. The designation highlights the historical significance of early computing hardware and supports preservation, funding, and public education around Korea's tech heritage.
items.summary_zh: 韩国将其第一台个人计算机 SE-8001 列为国家重要材料，凸显早期计算硬件的历史意义，并有助于相关文物的保护、资助与公众科普。

items.title_en: Reading the internals of Postgres: Database cluster, databases, and tables
items.title_zh: 解剖 PostgreSQL 内部：数据库集群、数据库与表
items.summary_en: A digest of Postgres architecture focusing on the cluster, databases, and tables, clarifying how data is organized and accessed across multiple layers.
items.summary_zh: 对 PostgreSQL 架构的要点梳理，聚焦集群、数据库和表，解释数据如何在多层之间组织与访问。

items.title_en: Ante: A new way to blend borrow checking and reference counting
items.title_zh: Ante：一种混合借用检查与引用计数的新方法
items.summary_en: Ante proposes a hybrid approach that blends compile-time borrow checking with runtime reference counting to improve memory safety and flexibility. By combining the strengths of both models, it aims to reduce common pitfalls in systems programming.
items.summary_zh: Ante 提出把编译时借用检查与运行时引用计数融合的混合方案，以提升内存安全性与灵活性。通过结合两种模型的优势，旨在减少系统编程中的常见风险。

items.title_en: Obfuscation: Building the final boss of cryptography (Part I)
items.title_zh: 混淆技术：构筑密码学的最终 Boss（第一部分）
items.summary_en: Vitalik discusses obfuscation as a difficult, controversial area in cryptography, outlining core ideas, limitations, and why deployments are debated. Part I surveys why obfuscation is hard, when it’s even possible, and what it means for practical security. The series sets up a deeper dive into next installments.
items.summary_zh: Vitalik 探讨了混淆在密码学中极为复杂且存在争议的地位，梳理了核心思想、局限性以及为何在实际部署中备受争议。第一部分概述了为何混淆难以实现、在何种情形下才有可能，以及对实际安全性意味着什么，为后续讨论打下基础。

items.title_en: I don't maintain my homelab, it maintains itself
items.title_zh: 我不维护我的家用实验室；它在维护自己
items.summary_en: A personal essay describes a self-sustaining home lab powered by automation and self-healing systems. The author shares scripts, monitoring, and pragmatic setups that keep the environment running with minimal manual intervention. It demonstrates a philosophy of resilient, hands-off infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 一篇个人随笔讲述一个由自动化和自愈系统驱动的自维持型家用实验室，作者分享了保持系统自行运行所需的脚本、监控和实用方案，强调了韧性与“无干预”基础设施的理念。

items.title_en: 1.38 Millimeter Microcontroller
items.title_zh: 1.38 毫米封装的微控制器
items.summary_en: TI's MSPM0C1104 microcontroller ships in an ultra-tiny 1.38-mm package, enabling ultra-compact devices with integrated peripherals and low power needs.
items.summary_zh: TI 的 MSPM0C1104 微控制器采用极小的 1.38 毫米封装，助力超小型设备实现低功耗与集成外设的需求。

items.title_en: A peek into Reddit's anti-spam internals
items.title_zh: 窥探 Reddit 反垃圾内部机制
items.summary_en: An exploration of Reddit's anti-spam backend, including heuristics, moderation pipelines, and the ongoing balance between openness and safety.
items.summary_zh: 对 Reddit 反垃圾后台的探索，涵盖启发式算法、审核流程，以及开放性与安全的权衡。

items.title_en: Stroustrup's Rule (2024)
items.title_zh: 斯特劳斯特鲁普规则（2024）
items.summary_en: A concise rule from Bjarne Stroustrup on software design in 2024.
items.summary_zh: 来自巴纳尼•斯特劳斯特鲁普在2024年的一条简短设计原则。

items.title_en: I built a 10 inch mini rack from aluminium extrusions
items.title_zh: 用铝型材自制的10英寸机架
items.summary_en: A hands-on build of a 10-inch aluminum-extrusion rack, detailing rigidity considerations, hardware choices, and space-efficient lab setups.
items.summary_zh: 用铝型材自制的10英寸机架的动手建造，讲解刚性、配件选择和紧凑实验室布置。

items.title_en: Set up your own DoH (DNS over HTTPS) service
items.title_zh: 搭建你自己的 DoH（DNS over HTTPS）服务
items.summary_en: A practical guide to running your own DNS over HTTPS service, covering privacy benefits, operational considerations, and common pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 提供搭建 DoH 服务的实用指南，涵盖隐私收益、运维要点与常见坑点。

items.title_en: A deep dive into SmallVector:push_back
items.title_zh: 深入解析 SmallVector::push_back
items.summary_en: A deep dive into SmallVector's push_back explains how inline storage, capacity growth, and move semantics minimize allocations in performance-critical code. The post uncovers micro-optimizations and gotchas when using SmallVector in C++ projects. It’s a useful read for anyone optimizing containers.
items.summary_zh: 对 SmallVector::push_back 的深入分析揭示了内联存储、容量扩展和移动语义如何在高性能代码中最小化分配。文章揭示了在使用 SmallVector 时的微优化和潜在坑点，对希望优化容器性能的 C++ 开发者颇具价值。

items.title_en: Compiler-Assisted Floating-Point Error Analysis and Profiling with FPChecker
items.title_zh: 使用 FPChecker 的编译器辅助浮点误差分析与性能分析
items.summary_en: FPChecker provides compiler-assisted floating-point error analysis and profiling to catch numerical issues early. The tool helps identify precision problems, rounding errors, and hotspots in numeric code, guiding fixes for reliability. It demonstrates how tooling can bring formal rigor into practical debugging.
items.summary_zh: FPChecker 提供编译器辅助的浮点误差分析与性能分析，帮助及早发现数值问题。该工具有助于识别精度问题、舍入误差和数值代码中的热点，指引修正以提升可靠性，展示了将形式化方法引入实际调试的思路。

items.title_en: Long Island's decommissioned nuclear power plant
items.title_zh: 长岛退役核电站探访
items.summary_en: A visit to a decommissioned nuclear plant on Long Island reveals dismantling work, lessons on waste management, and the realities of winding down aging reactors.
items.summary_zh: 对长岛退役核电站的参观揭示了拆除工作、废物管理的经验，以及处理老旧反应堆退役的现实挑战。

items.title_en: Scaling Laws, Carefully
items.title_zh: 谨慎对待扩展规律
items.summary_en: A nuanced look at scaling laws for AI emphasizes that bigger models alone aren’t sufficient. It argues for attention to data quality, architecture, and efficient compute, while urging careful experimentation to avoid overclaiming gains.
items.summary_zh: 对 AI 扩展规律的细致分析强调，单靠更大模型并不能保证进展。应关注数据质量、架构和高效计算，并通过谨慎的实验避免对收益的空泛夸大。

items.title_en: Matrix URIs, a URL syntax from Tim Berners-Lee that never shipped (1996)
items.title_zh: Matrix URIs, a URL syntax from Tim Berners-Lee that never shipped (1996)
items.summary_en: A retrospective on Matrix URIs, Tim Berners-Lee's proposed URL syntax from 1996 that never shipped.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 Tim Berners-Lee 提出但未落地的 Matrix URIs 语法，1996 年的设计尝试揭示了早期网页架构的权衡。

items.title_en: RF hacking my cloud-controlled ceiling fan
items.title_zh: 用 RF 入侵云控吊扇的安全研究
items.summary_en: A security-focused experiment shows how RF signals control a cloud-connected ceiling fan, exposing potential IoT vulnerabilities and how to mitigate them.
items.summary_zh: 一项安全实验揭示了云控吊扇的射频遥控漏洞，暴露物联网安全隐患并给出缓解思路。

items.title_en: 6 years and 360 patches to clean all instances of strnpy out of the Linux kernel
items.title_zh: 6 年和 360 个补丁，清除 Linux 内核中的 strncpy 实例
items.summary_en: A long-running patch effort finally removes all strncpy uses from the kernel, citing safety concerns and a rewrite to safer strncpy-like behavior; demonstrates incremental code quality improvements.
items.summary_zh: 通过长期努力，彻底移除 Linux 内核中所有 strncpy 的使用，强调安全性与向更安全实现的改写，展示代码质量的渐进改进。

items.title_en: Pystd, similar-ish functionality with a fraction of the compile time
items.title_zh: Pystd：功能相近，编译时间大幅缩短
items.summary_en: Pystd offers a Python standard library-like experience with substantially reduced compile-time. It targets environments where startup time matters, enabling faster iterations without sacrificing core functionality.
items.summary_zh: Pystd 提供类似 Python 标准库的功能，但编译时间大幅缩短，适用于对启动时间敏感的场景。该项目旨在在不牺牲核心功能的前提下提升开发与部署速度。

items.title_en: Hengefinder
items.title_zh: Hengefinder
items.summary_en: Hengefinder appears to be a project aimed at locating and mapping ancient henge monuments.
items.summary_zh: Hengefinder 似乎是一个用于定位和绘制古代圆环遗址的项目。

items.title_en: How information theory saved my word game
items.title_zh: 信息理论如何拯救了我的文字游戏
items.summary_en: Entropy-based strategies dramatically improved a word game's guessing and decision-making, showing practical value of information theory in game design. The approach demonstrates how theoretical ideas can directly boost playability.
items.summary_zh: 作者在字谜游戏中应用信息理论优化信息增益与决策过程，显著提升玩法效率和玩家体验，展示信息理论在游戏设计中的实用价值。

items.title_en: Segmenting Robot Video into Actionable Subtasks
items.title_zh: 将机器人视频分割为可执行子任务
items.summary_en: A blog outlines annotating robot videos by dividing tasks into actionable subtasks, enabling better learning signals for imitation and planning. This structured approach helps improve robotic learning datasets and evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍将机器人视频分割为可执行的子任务，以便为模仿学习和计划提供更清晰的学习信号。该方法提升了数据质量和对复杂操作的标注结构性。

items.title_en: Homemade Transistor from Cadmium Sulfide Photocell (2009)
items.title_zh: 用镉硫化物光电池自制晶体管（2009）
items.summary_en: A 2009 project documents building a crude transistor from a CdS photocell, illustrating early DIY semiconductor experimentation and educational value.
items.summary_zh: 2009 年的一个项目记录了用镉硫化物光电池自制晶体管的尝试，展示了早期业余半导体实验的实践性与教育意义。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Pixel Art Emojis
items.title_zh: 1 位像素艺术表情符号
items.summary_en: 1-bit pixel art emojis demonstrate extreme minimalism in glyph design, trading detail for iconic shapes. The project explores how much expression can be conveyed with a single bit, with potential uses in tiny UIs, retro games, or terminal art. It’s a playful reminder of design efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 1 位像素艺术表情符号展示了极简图形设计中的表达力极限，以极少的细节换取标志性造型。该项目探讨在单比特色彩下能传达多少情感，适用于极小的界面、怀旧游戏或终端艺术，体现了设计的高效性。
